message:
refactor(tests): Extract constants from net_unix.rs test functions

Move DATA_SIZE and NUM_CLIENTS constants to module level as
NET_UDS_DATA_SIZE and NET_UDS_NUM_CLIENTS to:
- Avoid constants defined inside function bodies (clippy warning)
- Make test parameters discoverable at module level
- Enable reuse across multiple test functions if needed

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
